name: Clasped Sculpture
descs:
[Effects apply only to #3, #4 Deployed Identities]

If there are 2+ remaining Coins after a Clash using a Blunt Skill, deal +10% damage; if there are 3+ remaining Coins, deal +20% damage; if there are 4+ remaining Coins, deal +40% damage.

[Effects apply only to #3, #4, and #5 Deployed Identities]

If there are 2+ remaining Coins after a Clash using a Blunt Skill, deal +10% damage; if there are 3+ remaining Coins, deal +20% damage; if there are 4+ remaining Coins, deal +40% damage.

[Effects apply only to #3, #4, #5, and #6 Deployed Identities]

If there are 2+ remaining Coins after a Clash using a Blunt Skill, deal +12.5% damage; if there are 3+ remaining Coins, deal +25% damage; if there are 4+ remaining Coins, deal +50% damage.
